growth_records.medium: Mineral salt medium (MSM) with benzophenone as sole carbon source

up.method: GC-MS (Agilent 7890B, LOD 0.1 mg/L); from 20 mg/L initial
pseudo-first-order (Lagergren) kinetic fit; S4 best fit PFO1

sec.compound: BZP degradation metabolites (ring-cleavage products; phenyl cyclohexyl ketone, benzophenone dimethyl ketal, 2-cyclohexen-1-one, benzcarbothioic acid, heptacosane)

growth_records.cite: Maqsood A et al. Isolation, identification and subsequent application of Gram-positive bacterial strains for the bioremediation of benzophenone. RSC Advances (2025). DOI:10.1039/d5ra05131b. [PMC12642988]
growth_records.snippet: S4 acclimated to their new environment faster than DK2, as seen by the lag phase of 3.5 h for S4 and 4 h for DK2... S4 showed 69.5% degradation... 1.0 x 10^6 +/- 10^2 CFU mL-1 after 72 h.
growth_records.notes: Bacillus pumilus S4, aerobic batch, 30C, pH 7, 150 rpm, MSM + 20 mg/L BZP sole carbon. Doubling time 1.7 h; mu = ln2/1.7 = 0.408 h-1 (CALCULATED). Lag phase 3.5 h. Biomass 1.0e6 CFU/mL at 72 h. BZP degradation 69.5% in 72 h (GC-MS). Cannot derive qS in mmol/gCDW/h (biomass in CFU/mL, not gDW). Kinetics: S4 best fit pseudo-first-order, rate constant K1=0.8 h-1.

mfa.note: Figure 1B; mostly respiratory, high relative TCA flux, unusually high malate->pyruvate shunt; lacks annotated 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase but PP flux observed.

growth_records.cite: Tannler, Simon et al. Maintenance metabolism and carbon fluxes in Bacillus species. Microbial Cell Factories (2008). DOI:10.1186/1475-2859-7-19. [PMC2442585]
growth_records.snippet: B. pumilus: growth rate 0.28; yield 0.33 gCDW/gglc; glucose 4.17; acetate 1.40 mmol/g/h (Table 2). Maintenance coefficient not determinable (non-linear qGlc vs D).
growth_records.notes: mu=0.28; td=0.693/0.28=2.48 h. qGlc 4.17, qAce 1.40 experimental (Table 2). Maintenance coefficient NOT determinable - irregular/non-linear qGlc vs dilution-rate under glucose limitation. Mostly respiratory metabolism. CDW/OD 0.61. Biotin/adenine auxotroph.
